# Viabl
> AI-powered business viability analysis for founders

Viabl analyzes business ideas across 9 dimensions in 60 seconds.
Free viability score and preview. Full report from $19.

## What Viabl does
- Scores market demand, competition, moat, execution risk, monetization
- Pulls live competitor data and market size via real-time web search
- Generates brand identity kits with name, tagline, colors, typography
- Creates investor pitch decks and GTM playbooks
- Provides actionable 90-day next steps

## Use cases
- Pre-build validation before spending money or time
- Pivot validation for existing businesses
- Comparing multiple idea options side by side

## Pricing
- Free: overall score + verdict + 2 dimensions
- Report $19: all 9 dimensions + PDF download
- Founder Pack $79: report + full brand identity kit
- Launch Kit $149: everything + pitch deck + GTM playbook + ZenBusiness LLC

## Access
Free analysis: https://viabl.co/analyze
